2603.15280.title: Advancing Multimodal Agent Reasoning with Long-Term Neuro-Symbolic Memory
2603.15280.paper_summary: Recent advances in large language models have driven the emergence of intelligent agents operating in open-world, multimodal environments. To support long-term reasoning, such agents are typically equipped with external memory systems. However, most existing multimodal agent memories rely primarily on neural representations and vector-based retrieval, which are well-suited for inductive, intuitive reasoning but fundamentally limited in supporting analytical, deductive reasoning critical for real-world decision making. To address this limitation, we propose NS-Mem, a long-term neuro-symbolic memory framework designed to advance multimodal agent reasoning by integrating neural memory with explicit symbolic structures and rules. Specifically, NS-Mem is operated around three core components of a memory system: (1) a three-layer memory architecture that consists episodic layer, semantic layer and logic rule layer, (2) a memory construction and maintenance mechanism implemented by SK-Gen that automatically consolidates structured knowledge from accumulated multimodal experiences and incrementally updates both neural representations and symbolic rules, and (3) a hybrid memory retrieval mechanism that combines similarity-based search with deterministic symbolic query functions to support structured reasoning. Experiments on real-world multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that Neural-Symbolic Memory achieves an average 4.35% improvement in overall reasoning accuracy over pure neural memory systems, with gains of up to 12.5% on constrained reasoning queries, validating the effectiveness of NS-Mem.
2603.15280.paper_summary_zh: 最近在大型語言模型方面的進展推動了智能代理在開放世界的多模態環境中出現。<lb/>為了支持長期推理，這些代理通常配備外部記憶系統。<lb/>然而，大多數現有的多模態代理記憶主要依賴神經表示和基於向量的檢索，這些方法適合於歸納性、直觀性的推理，但在支持分析性、演繹性推理方面根本有限，而這對於現實世界的決策至關重要。<lb/>為了解決這一限制，我們提出了NS-Mem，一種長期神經符號記憶框架，旨在通過將神經記憶與明確的符號結構和規則相結合來推進多模態代理的推理。<lb/>具體而言，NS-Mem圍繞記憶系統的三個核心組件運作： (1) 一個由情節層、語義層和邏輯規則層組成的三層記憶架構， (2) 由SK-Gen實現的記憶構建和維護機制，自動整合來自累積的多模態經驗的結構化知識並逐步更新神經表示和符號規則，以及 (3) 一種混合記憶檢索機制，結合基於相似性的搜索和確定性符號查詢功能，以支持結構化推理。<lb/>在現實世界的多模態推理基準上的實驗顯示，神經符號記憶在整體推理準確性上比純神經記憶系統平均提高了4.35%，在受限推理查詢上最高提高了12.5%，驗證了NS-Mem的有效性。
2603.15280.author: Rongjie Jiang et.al.
2603.15280.authors: Rongjie Jiang, Jianwei Wang, Gengda Zhao, Chengyang Luo, Kai Wang, Wenjie Zhang
